patch.value: GH-600: item id generation not collision-safe across branches/concurrent agents (4 base36 chars, local-disk-only uniqueness)

Cross-branch/concurrent id collision risk addressed: longer or content-derived id entropy option, and/or post-merge add/add collision detection in validate with remediation; collision probability documented for the default prefix; design coordinated with pm-khdq same-disk TOCTOU; repro/analysis from GH-600 recorded as tests

GH-600. Ids are prefix + 4 random base36 chars (~1.68M space); uniqueness enforced only via local on-disk idExists — blind to other branches and concurrent processes. Two agents branching from the same point can mint the same id for different items → silent identity collision surfacing as add/add merge conflict or ambiguous item. Same-disk sibling: pm-khdq (TOCTOU). Fix direction: entropy/length option or content-derived component + post-merge add/add collision detection in validate; document collision math per prefix length.
